name: The 30-minute Pizza
recipeIngredient: Mozzarella, ½ cup (or other melting cheese), thinly sliced or cut into 1-inch cubes
Fresh tomatoes, 1 1/2 lb, seeded, drained and roughly chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500F.
2. Mixing and kneading: Pulse yeast and 1 cup of flour in a food processor with the metal knife or plastic dough blade. Add hot water (ensure it's hot) and pulse until combined. Turn off machine, add remaining flour and salt, then continue pulsing until dough holds together. Let run continuously until a ball forms.
3. Assembly: Lightly oil a pan and dust with coarsely ground yellow cornmeal. Press dough into an 8-inch circle, then stretch or roll it into a 15-18 inch pizza shell. Place the shell on prepared pan and sprinkle toppings over dough. Drizzle with olive oil. Bake for 15 minutes or until crust is golden and toppings are bubbly. For a well-done crust, bake an additional 5 minutes. Makes 1 Pizza
